builder.formNotShipped: The visual form for "{{type}}" is not shipped yet — use Advanced (paste JSON) for now.

fields.name: Name
fields.inputSchemaHint: JSON Schema describing the inputs callers can pass to this composition. The visual editor for input_schema is coming later — paste raw JSON here for now.

steps.heading: Steps
steps.empty: No steps yet. Click "Add a step" to pick one of the 5 durable step types.

picker.title: Add a step
picker.description: Pick one of the durable step types. Legacy step types (tool, transform, foreach) can only be edited via the Advanced JSON tab.

elicit.title: Elicit — ask the user
elicit.description: Pause and ask the user for structured input via a schema.

wait_until.title: Wait until — pause on the clock
wait_until.description: Pause the workflow for a given duration or until a specific moment.

wait_callback.title: Wait callback — pause for a webhook
wait_callback.description: Pause until an external system posts back to a generated callback URL.

subcomposition.title: Subcomposition — run another composition
subcomposition.description: Run another production composition with mapped inputs and wait for its result.

approval.title: Approval — gate on a human decision
approval.description: Pause until an approver (user or role) approves or rejects this step.

elicit.messagePlaceholder: What should we ask the user? You can reference ${input.X} or ${step_id.path}.
elicit.messageHint: Question shown to the user when the workflow suspends.
elicit.schemaHint: JSON Schema (object) describing the fields the user must fill in. At runtime, BigMCP renders a form from this schema.
elicit.schemaJsonError: Invalid JSON Schema — must be a valid JSON object (e.g. {"type":"object","properties":{}}).
elicit.ttlHint: Max time before the elicit expires. Between 1 and 86400 (24h). Defaults to 300s if left blank.

waitUntil.relativeHint: Resume this many seconds after suspension. Useful for "retry in 5 minutes" patterns.
waitUntil.absoluteHint: Resume at this exact moment in time. Stored as ISO-8601.
waitUntil.resumeAtHelper: Local time; the backend interprets it as the same wall clock and converts to UTC.

waitCallback.runtimeNote: A HMAC-protected callback URL is generated by the runtime when this step suspends. You will find it in the execution timeline — pass it to the external system so it can POST back to resume the workflow.
waitCallback.expectedSchemaHint: Optional JSON Schema (object) for validating the callback payload. Leave empty to accept any payload.
waitCallback.expectedSchemaJsonError: Must be a valid JSON object (JSON Schema). Arrays and scalars are not allowed.
waitCallback.ttlHint: Max time before the callback expires. Defaults to 86400 (24h, the hard cap).

subcomposition.compositionHint: Only production compositions of your organization are listed. The child runs with the same user and org as this composition.
subcomposition.emptyMessage: Promote a composition to production before referencing it here. A draft or validated composition can't be called as a subcomposition.
subcomposition.inputsHint: Optional JSON object passed as the child's inputs. Leaf strings support ${input.X} and ${step_id.path} substitutions, resolved at suspend time.
subcomposition.inputsJsonError: Invalid JSON — inputs must be a valid JSON object (e.g. {"customer_id":"${input.customer_id}"}).

approval.messagePlaceholder: What should we ask the approver? You can reference ${input.X} or ${step_id.path}.
approval.messageHint: Text shown to the approver in /app/compositions/approvals.
approval.approverUserIdsHint: One user UUID per line. Leave empty to gate by role only.
approval.approverUserIdsInvalid: Invalid UUID on line(s): {{lines}}. Each line must be a valid UUID.
approval.allowedRolesHint: Click a role to toggle it. Anyone holding the selected role in this org can approve.
approval.responseSchemaHint: JSON Schema (object) describing extra fields the approver must fill alongside the decision (e.g. a rationale or ticket number). Leave empty if the decision alone is enough.
approval.responseSchemaJsonError: Invalid JSON Schema — must be a valid JSON object (e.g. {"type":"object","properties":{}}).
approval.ttlHint: Max time before the approval expires. Between 1 and 86400 (24h). Defaults to 86400s if left blank.
approval.allowSelfApprovalHint: Dangerous. When enabled, the user who launched the composition can approve their own step (four-eyes rule disabled).
approval.noApproverSelected: Pick at least one approver user OR one approver role — otherwise nobody can resume this step.

legacy.notice: This step uses a legacy step type (tool / transform / foreach). It is preserved as-is when you save. Use "Edit raw JSON" to modify it.

deleteStep.title: Delete this step?
deleteStep.message: Step "{{stepId}}" will be removed from the draft. This action can be undone by re-adding the step.

errors.wait_until.mustPickMode: Pick either a relative duration or an absolute timestamp.
errors.wait_until.mutuallyExclusive: Only one of wait_seconds or resume_at can be set.
errors.wait_until.waitSecondsPositive: wait_seconds must be a positive integer.
errors.wait_until.resumeAtFormat: resume_at must be a valid ISO-8601 timestamp.
errors.elicit.schemaInvalid: Response JSON Schema must be a valid object.
errors.subcomposition.compositionIdRequired: Pick a production composition to call.
errors.approval.noApprover: Add at least one approver user or role.

productionEdit.title: Editing a production composition
productionEdit.message: Saving these changes will move the composition back to a temporary draft so it gets re-validated before being promoted again. The production version stays live until you promote the new draft.
